questionHtml:
A cell has an emf of 3.0 V and an internal resistance of 2.0 Ω. The cell is connected in series with a resistance of 10 Ω.

What is the terminal potential difference of the cell?


A.  0.5 V

B.  1.5 V

C.  2.5 V

D.  3.0 V

meta.title: A cell has an emf of 3.0 V and an internal resistance of 2.0 Ω. The cell is connected in series with a resistance of 10 Ω. What is the terminal potential difference of the cell? A.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
